title: Chatbot-powered Live Event Moderator
scenario: Create a prompt that will generate a high-quality, engaging, and polished persona-based chatbot dialogue for a live event moderator. The target output should be a text-based dialogue that incorporates style, expertise, and audience interaction. The moderator should be able to introduce speakers, facilitate Q&A sessions, and keep the audience engaged throughout the event. The dialogue should be 5-7 lines long, use a professional and engaging tone, and include a clear call-to-action for attendees to participate in the Q&A session.
constraints: Must include a minimum of 2 audience questions and responses

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the dialogue adhere to the specified constraints?
Is the tone of the dialogue professional, engaging, and polished?
Is the dialogue high-quality, informative, and entertaining?
Does the dialogue demonstrate effective moderation skills, including introducing speakers and facilitating Q&A sessions?
